nav.localModeExplain: Local single-user mode — you're signed in automatically, so there's nothing to sign out of.
nav.demoBanner: Demo mode — no AI provider configured. Responses are mocked.
nav.demoBannerAction: Set up a local or cloud model →

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Your data, your models, your rules.

language.title: Language
language.description: Choose the language Donna's interface uses. Translations are added over time; untranslated text falls back to English.
language.label: Display language
language.hint: Saved to your account and remembered on this device.

oauth.notConfigured: {{provider}} sign-in isn't configured on this server yet — see docs/auth.md for setup.

signin.title: Sign in to Donna
signin.localModeRedirect: Donna is running in local single-user mode — signing you in…
signin.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts — try again in a few minutes.

errors.email_unverified: That email already has an account. Sign in with your password, then link this provider in Settings.
errors.email_in_use: That email already has an account. Sign in with your password, then link this provider in Settings.
errors.already_linked: That account is already linked to a different user.
errors.no_email: Your provider account has no email address.

signup.title: Create your Donna account
signup.name: Name
signup.terms: I acknowledge the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.

forgot.title: Reset your password
forgot.intro1: Donna is self-hosted and doesn’t send email, so there’s no reset link we can send you.
forgot.intro2: Instead, whoever runs your Donna server (maybe you!) can set a new password from the server machine:
forgot.intro3: Once that’s done, come back and sign in with the new password.
